ogTitle: Willung vs Wilsons Hill: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Willung and Wilsons Hill.
heading: Willung vs Wilsons Hill — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Willung, Victoria and Wilsons Hill, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Willung has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to Wilsons Hill (35/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Willung or Wilsons Hill safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Willung has a flood risk score of 26/100, while Wilsons Hill scores 33/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Willung scores 49/100 for bushfire risk. Wilsons Hill scores 34/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Willung or Wilsons Hill?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Willung has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.75% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
